Resource Profile: RA Parameters ccRemark Patch Profile

Official URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/StructureDefinition/ra-parameters-cc-remark-patch Version: 3.0.0-ballot
Standards status: Trial-use Active as of 2026-03-08 Maturity Level: 1 Computable Name: CCRemarkPatchParameters
Other Identifiers: OID:2.16.840.1.113883.4.642.40.29.42.14

Copyright/Legal: Used by permission of HL7 International, all rights reserved Creative Commons License

A Parameters profile that defines structures of multi-part Parameters to be used for sending Condition Category Remarks to a Risk Adjustment Coding Gap Report using the PATCH operation.

Usages:

  • Examples for this Profile: Parameters/ra-measurereport01-patch-mult and Parameters/ra-measurereport01-patch

You can also check for usages in the FHIR IG Statistics

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description Differentials, Snapshots, and other representations.

  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Statistics/References
  • All

Documentation for this format

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()
inv-1 error Parameters.parameter, Parameters.parameter:operation A parameter must have one and only one of (value, resource, part) (part.exists() and value.empty() and resource.empty()) or (part.empty() and (value.exists() xor resource.exists()))
ra-3 error Parameters.parameter:operation.part:path.value[x]:valueString Path must start with 'MeasureReport.group.where(id='. value.startsWith('MeasureReport.group.where(id=')

Path Status Usage ValueSet Version Source
Parameters.language Base preferred Common Languages 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()
inv-1 error Parameters.parameter, Parameters.parameter:operation A parameter must have one and only one of (value, resource, part) (part.exists() and value.empty() and resource.empty()) or (part.empty() and (value.exists() xor resource.exists()))
ra-3 error Parameters.parameter:operation.part:path.value[x]:valueString Path must start with 'MeasureReport.group.where(id='. value.startsWith('MeasureReport.group.where(id=')

Summary

Mandatory: 0 element(12 nested mandatory elements)
Fixed: 10 elements

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Parameters.parameter
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Parameters.parameter.part
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Parameters.parameter.part.part

Maturity: 1

Documentation for this format

Terminology Bindings

Path Status Usage ValueSet Version Source
Parameters.language Base preferred Common Languages 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()
inv-1 error Parameters.parameter, Parameters.parameter:operation A parameter must have one and only one of (value, resource, part) (part.exists() and value.empty() and resource.empty()) or (part.empty() and (value.exists() xor resource.exists()))
ra-3 error Parameters.parameter:operation.part:path.value[x]:valueString Path must start with 'MeasureReport.group.where(id='. value.startsWith('MeasureReport.group.where(id=')

Summary

Mandatory: 0 element(12 nested mandatory elements)
Fixed: 10 elements

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Parameters.parameter
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Parameters.parameter.part
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Parameters.parameter.part.part

Maturity: 1

 

Other representations of profile: CSV, Excel, Schematron
